# format: html5-dom-v2
# status: active

#dom-snapshot-v2
#document
  element ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
      element ns=mathml local="math" attrs=[]
        element ns=mathml local="mtext" attrs=[]
          element ns=html local="span" attrs=[]
            "x"
        element ns=mathml local="annotation-xml" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="encoding" value="text/html"}]
          element ns=html local="b" attrs=[]
            "y"
